articles.title: Prime Day ends tonight. These deals are still worth buying. - SFGATE

articles.title: U.S. government gives Anthropic green light for limited re-release of Mythos 5 - NBC News
articles.description: The U.S. government is allowing Anthropic to deploy its Mythos 5 model to a select group of customers and partners, according to a letter from Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick to Anthropic that was seen by NBC News

articles.title: OpenAI releases powerful new GPT-5.6 model under restrictions - Axios
articles.description: The company agreed to limit the rollout after a request from the Trump administration, which cited national security concerns.

articles.title: Saks officially emerges from Chapter 11 bankruptcy with less debt and a new name - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
articles.description: Saks Global, the parent company of Neiman Marcus, Saks Fifth Avenue and Bergdorf Goodman, officially emerged from Chapter 11 bankruptcy Friday with fewer stores, less debt, a more focused strategy to pamper the affluent — and a new name

articles.title: Wall Street regulator investigating prediction market giant Polymarket - Politico

articles.title: AI Power Stocks Could Be a Once-in-a-Generation Trade. Start With the Companies Behind Every Data Center. - Barchart.com

articles.title: Labor strike ends with new contract at acclaimed Seattle oyster bar - The Seattle Times
articles.description: The flagship oyster bar of Renee Erickson's Sea Creatures restaurant group will reopen Friday after management and its staff labor union reached an agreement.

articles.title: Most of Wall Street rises, but sinking AI stocks send it lower for the week - AP News
articles.description: Most of the U.S. stock market rose after oil prices eased back to where they were before the war with Iran, but drops for AI stocks kept the market in check. The S&P 500 finished Friday nearly flat and slipped less than 0.1% to close out just its second losin…

articles.description: Yields move towards levels commonly associated with junk-rated companies

articles.title: Polestar banned from US market under rule targeting China-linked connected vehicles - Fox Business
articles.description: Polestar says the Trump administration is forcing it to stop selling EVs in the U.S. starting with the 2027 model year under connected vehicle rules.

articles.title: Dell shareholders approve legal move from Delaware to Texas - Fox Business

articles.title: Tech Took a Header. The Rest of the Market Marched On. - Barron's

articles.title: Historic layoffs: VW expected to cut 100,000 workers - Axios
articles.description: Volkswagen reportedly plans to lay off up to 100,000 employees worldwide in a massive downsizing that illustrates how Chinese competition is reshaping the global automotive industry.
